query: Please help me plan a 3-day trip for 3 people from Austin to New Orleans, from March 10th to March 12th, 2022. Our total budget is $1,800. We are traveling with a pet, so we need pet-friendly accommodations. We prefer private rooms rather than shared spaces. We do not want to fly, so please arrange alternative transportation. During our stay, we would love to experience Cajun and Creole cuisine.
common_sense_constraints: Return to Austin on the last day (March 12th)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner for all 3 travelers
Accommodation must have enough capacity for 3 people plus a pet
Pet-friendly restaurants should be preferred where possible
Transportation between Austin and New Orleans must not involve flying

query: I need a 5-day travel plan for a family of 6 (including two children under 10) from Chicago to Florida, visiting 2 different cities, from March 15th to March 19th, 2022. Our budget is $8,000. We need accommodations suitable for children under 10 and we require entire rooms (not private rooms in shared apartments). We prefer not to self-drive between cities. We would like American cuisine options.
common_sense_constraints: Return to Chicago on the last day (March 19th)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner for all 6 travelers
Accommodation must have enough capacity for 6 people
Attractions should be family-friendly and suitable for young children
Inter-city transportation must not involve self-driving

query: Please arrange a 3-day trip for 4 colleagues from San Francisco to Las Vegas from March 5th to March 7th, 2022. Budget is $4,500. We need accommodations where parties are allowed, ideally entire rooms. We do not want to take flights. We enjoy Chinese and Italian cuisine. Smoking should be allowed at the accommodation.
common_sense_constraints: Return to San Francisco on the last day (March 7th)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner for all 4 travelers
Accommodation must have enough capacity for 4 people
Inter-city transportation must not involve flying
Smoking-friendly accommodations are preferred

query: Help me plan a 3-day solo trip from Miami to Tampa from March 20th to March 22nd, 2022. My budget is only $900. I need a private room. I do not want to self-drive. I love seafood and BBQ. Please ensure the place is pet-friendly as I travel with my dog.
common_sense_constraints: Return to Miami on the last day (March 22nd)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner
Pet-friendly restaurants should be preferred where possible
Inter-city transportation must not involve self-driving
The tight budget ($900) must cover all transportation, accommodation, and meals for 3 days

query: Could you create a 5-day itinerary for 2 couples (4 people) starting in Seattle and visiting 2 cities in Arizona? Travel dates are March 8th to March 12th, 2022. Budget is $6,500. We prefer private rooms. Smoking should be allowed at the accommodation. We prefer not to self-drive between cities. We enjoy Mexican and Mediterranean food.
common_sense_constraints: Return to Seattle on the last day (March 12th)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner for all 4 travelers
Accommodation must have enough capacity for 4 people
Inter-city transportation must not involve self-driving
Smoking-friendly accommodations are preferred

query: Plan a 7-day trip for a group of 8 friends from Boston to Colorado, visiting 3 different cities, from March 1st to March 7th, 2022. Our budget is $15,000. We need entire rooms. We require accommodations that allow parties. We prefer not to self-drive between cities. We want to experience American, Italian, and Indian cuisine.
common_sense_constraints: Return to Boston on the last day (March 7th)
Each full day should include breakfast, lunch, and dinner for all 8 travelers
Accommodation must have enough capacity for 8 people
Inter-city transportation must not involve self-driving
Multi-city itinerary must logically connect 3 distinct cities in Colorado
